rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Seems like that Ivan guy was sneaking
snacks in the storehouse again.

rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Karina caught him and treated
him like a felon. It turned
into a huge fuss.

rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I managed to calm it down, but it
made me realize how different the
values are between Superbia and Iira.

rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0004
rows.name:
Ivan can never control his appetite.
What he did was wrong, but he didn't
really mean any major harm...

rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0005
rows.name:
I'll talk with Karina
again. I want to learn
more about Superbia too...

rows.label: tlk70000053_03_msg0006
rows.name:
The secret to understanding is
accepting each other's differences.
That's what Adel-sama taught me!
